query: SELECT service, credentialKey, LEFT(credentialValue, 30) as value_preview FROM aiVaCredentials WHERE service = 'google_ads';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 8H2GiF9TtL9Hx6i.root --database 4ocuaVfrPR2qxUA9U855oL --execute SELECT service, credentialKey, LEFT(credentialValue, 30) as value_preview FROM aiVaCredentials WHERE service = 'google_ads';
